violations.text: The hand-sink in the restroom is lacking a hand washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
Inspector observed establishment self-baiting for rodents. PIC informed that bate must be stored in bait stations. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators AND retail shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back corner. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2026

The floors, especially under shelves and around equipment have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RODOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. PIC to obtain thermometer for refrigeration unit containing milk and eggs. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
Various beverages were observed stored on the floor in the throughout the establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
The following area have an accumulation of dirt and debris: -Shelving throughout the establishment -shelving in refrigerators -refrigerator door tracks. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Shelving throughout the establishment -shelving in refrigerators -refrigerator door tracks. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the establishment. Inspector observed unused soda crates and storage containers. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
